verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The Church is going higher than it's been before, Rejoicing over Zion, We'll sing forever more; We'll renew old acquaintance on that golden shore, And the Church is going higher than it's been before

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: On the day of Pentecost came a mighty rushing wind, Well, it filled the house with power all men knew their own language; And God gave them just a taste of what we all have in store, 'Cause someday we're going higher than we've been before.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: God's children have been battered, scorned on every hand. The world sees the Church and says this ship is going down; But I have got good news, and that the world just can't ignore, Victory's already mine, I'm going higher than before..

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Rising up, rising up! There's a new testament Church Rising up.
